---
title: "MONET: Model of Neutral Evolution of Traits"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{MONET Tutorial}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The full MONET tutorial is available as a PDF (`vignette_main.pdf`) in the
`vignettes/` folder of the package source and on the
[GitHub repository](https://github.com/isadoo/MONET).

For a quick start, see the README at the repository root.
